websocket.c(3) Library Functions Manual websocket.c(3)

NAME

websocket.c - Libwebsockets logging integration.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void lws_log_init_server (void)
Initialize libwebsockets logging for server mode. void lws_log_init_client (void)
Initialize libwebsockets logging for client mode.

Detailed Description

Libwebsockets logging integration.

Routes libwebsockets log output through our logging system.

Definition in file websocket.c.

Function Documentation

void lws_log_init_client (void )

Initialize libwebsockets logging for client mode. Sets up the lws_set_log_level() callback to route client logs through our logging system with [LWS:client] prefix.

Definition at line 99 of file websocket.c.

99                                {
100   // Enable libwebsockets logging with our custom callback
101   // In debug builds: include LLL_DEBUG for detailed TLS/handshake diagnostics
102   // In release builds: exclude DEBUG to reduce noise
103 #ifdef CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_DEBUG
104   int log_level = LLL_ERR | LLL_WARN | LLL_NOTICE | LLL_INFO | LLL_DEBUG;
105 #else
106   int log_level = LLL_ERR | LLL_WARN | LLL_NOTICE | LLL_INFO;
107 #endif
108   lws_set_log_level(log_level, websocket_client_lws_log_callback);
109 }




Referenced by acip_websocket_client_transport_create().






void
  lws_log_init_server (void )


Initialize libwebsockets logging for server mode. Sets up the
    lws_set_log_level() callback to route server logs through our logging system
    with [LWS:server] prefix.


Definition at line 87 of file websocket.c.


87                                {
88   // Enable libwebsockets logging with our custom callback
89   // In debug builds: include LLL_DEBUG for detailed TLS/handshake diagnostics
90   // In release builds: exclude DEBUG to reduce noise
91 #ifdef CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_DEBUG
92   int log_level = LLL_ERR | LLL_WARN | LLL_NOTICE | LLL_INFO | LLL_DEBUG;
93 #else
94   int log_level = LLL_ERR | LLL_WARN | LLL_NOTICE | LLL_INFO;
95 #endif
96   lws_set_log_level(log_level, websocket_server_lws_log_callback);
97 }






Referenced by websocket_server_init().
